title: Earliest pack; high-standard 3-column delta map
public_claim: Red Team Lab Tranche A is the earliest consolidated handoff for the later Red Team Lab family.
distinctive_mechanism: It provides the original three-column canon/live/vNext delta map, Tranche A package structure, and template logic that later Red Team packs inherited and extended.
use_value: It matters because it preserves the origin of the Red Team Lab authority chain and keeps later variants from looking like unrelated fragments.
